title: Gemini sent $10M in Bitcoin to Trump PAC after joint motion with CFTC
summary: The Bitcoin donation can be used to support Donald Trump as a New York court considers whether to reverse a $5 million settlement between the CFTC and Gemini.

title: Coinbase lets businesses accept USDC payments from AI agents
summary: The exchange also introduced AI trading tools and a developer kit as part of a broader push to build financial infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.

title: Trive-Backed Lyntris Files For US IPO, Joining Defense Rush
summary: Lyntris Inc., a defense technology firm backed by Trive Capital, filed for a US initial public offering.

title: Asian Stocks Set to Fall as Oil Surges Past $100: Markets Wrap
summary: Stocks in Asia were poised for declines after a sharp Wall Street selloff, while oil surged above $100 a barrel for the first time in two months as an escalating Middle East conflict stoked fears of renewed inflation.

title: Bitcoinist.App Brings Private Mining Pools to iOS

Bitcoin Magazine

The only Bitcoin mining app on the Apple App Store that lets users create private pools, invite friends and family to combine hashpower, and compete with the global Bitcoin hashrate, while payouts go directly to wallets they control

title: Black Forest Labs Unveils FLUX 3 AI: Ditches Stills for Video—And Robot Hands
summary: FLUX 3 is the German AI lab’s first video model, and the same system is already teaching robots to work an Audi assembly line.

title: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act
summary: Solomon's endorsement splits with JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon and banking trade groups, who warn the bill's stablecoin-yield provisions could pull deposits away from traditional lenders.

title: Robinhood CEO’s X account hacked to promote Vladhood memecoin flagged as ‘scam’
summary: Robinhood Chain has seen cumulative DEX volume of about $9 billion, primarily driven by higher-risk memecoins, per Entropy Advisors.

title: MoonPay now accepts Discover Network cards for crypto purchases and sales in US
summary: The addition makes Discover the third major U.S. card network supported by MoonPay, alongside Visa and Mastercard.

title: US hits 60 countries with new duties as Donald Trump rebuilds tariff wall
summary: Administration pins new measures on forced labour probe after Supreme Court struck down blanket levies

title: Intel shares rally after chipmaker posts fastest growth in 15 years
summary: Chipmaker’s revenue jumped 25% in the second quarter
